channel.title: GPT on Arne N. Langner
channel.description: Recent content in GPT on Arne N. Langner

item.title: ChatGPT 2 - Visualizing Project Timelines with mermaid.js
item.description: This is the second post on visualizations using ChatGPT - see the first article here. In this post we’ll have another look at ways to generate visualizations using the openAI’s ChatGPT, and diagrams-as-code. This time we will focus on turning a verbal description of a work plan into a GANTT chart. Tools Note: In the examples shown here, I will be using the openAI playground. It offers the same davinci-003 model that also powers the regular ChatGPT service but allows for cleaner output, more tuning options, and - seemingly - fewer throttling of requests.

item.title: ChatGPT 1 - Visualizing System Architecture using PlantUML
item.description: In this post we’ll have a look at ways to generate visualizations using the openAI’s ChatGPT, and diagrams-as-code. ChatGPT does a great job at combining, summarizing and cross-referencing text. In many use-cases I would prefer to get some kind of visual overview though, either for my own comprehension or in order to present this information to others. The current UI of ChatGPT does not provide any other output than text though.
